mapper.select: SELECT TOP 1 A.COMP_CD AS compCd, C.COMP_NM AS compNm, LTRIM(RTRIM(A.USER_ID)) AS userId, A.USER_NM AS userNm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(500), A.PASS_WD) AS passWd, A.MAIN_GU AS mainGu, A.START_DT AS startDt, A.END_DT AS endDt, A.USE_YN AS useYn, A.COMMST_YN AS commstYn, A.ACTION_YN AS actionYn FROM TBL_USER_MST A LEFT JOIN TBL_COMP_MST C ON C.COMP_CD = A.COMP_CD WHERE A.COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND LTRIM(RTRIM(A.USER_ID)) = #{userId} AND A.ACTION_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.START_DT DESC, A.JOB_SEQ DESC

SELECT TOP 1 A.COMP_CD AS compCd, LTRIM(RTRIM(A.USER_ID)) AS userId, A.USER_NM AS userNm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(500), A.PASS_WD) AS passWd FROM TBL_USER_MST A WHERE A.COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND LTRIM(RTRIM(A.USER_ID)) = #{userId} AND A.ACTION_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.START_DT DESC, A.JOB_SEQ DESC

SELECT CM.COMP_CD AS compCd, RTRIM(CM.COMP_NM) AS compNm, CM.COMP_ADDR AS compAddr, CM.COMP_EXTRADR AS compExtradr, CM.COMP_CEO AS compCeo, CM.BUSI_NUM AS busiNum, CM.INACCD AS inaccd, CM.ZIP_CD AS zipCd, CM.COMP_TEL AS compTel, CM.COMP_FAX AS compFax, CM.JOIN_DT AS joinDt, CM.START_DT AS startDt, CM.END_DT AS endDt, CM.ACCEPT_DT AS acceptDt, CM.CLOSE_DT AS closeDt, CM.USE_YN AS useYn, CM.COMMST_YN AS commstYn, CM.STHPNM AS sthpnm, CM.ACTION_YN AS actionYn, CM.REG_DTTM AS regDttm, CM.UPD_DTTM AS updDttm, 'N' AS fileYn FROM TBL_COMP_MST CM WHERE CM.ACTION_YN = 'Y'
AND CM.COMP_CD = #{compCd}
AND ( CM.COMP_CD LIKE '%' + #{findData} + '%' OR CM.COMP_NM LIKE '%' + #{findData} + '%' )
ORDER BY CM.COMP_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMP_MST ( COMP_CD, JOB_SEQ, COMP_NM, COMP_ADDR, COMP_EXTRADR, COMP_CEO, BUSI_NUM, INACCD, ZIP_CD, COMP_TEL, COMP_FAX, START_DT, END_DT, JOIN_DT, ACCEPT_DT, CLOSE_DT, USE_YN, ACTION_YN, STHPNM, COMMST_YN, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{compCd}, (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(A.JOB_SEQ),0)+1 FROM TBL_COMP_MST A WHERE A.COMP_CD = #{compCd}), #{compNm}, #{compAddr}, #{compExtradr}, #{compCeo}, #{busiNum}, #{inaccd}, #{zipCd}, #{compTel}, #{compFax}, #{startDt}, #{endDt}, #{joinDt}, #{acceptDt}, #{closeDt}, #{useYn}, 'Y', #{sthpnm}, #{commstYn}, GETDATE(), #{regUser}, #{regIp}, GETDATE(), #{updUser}, #{updIp} )
mapper.select: SELECT TOP 1 'Y' FROM TBL_COMP_MST WHERE COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND ACTION_YN = 'Y'

SELECT A.COMP_CD AS compCd, A.START_DT AS startDt, A.END_DT AS endDt, A.CON_CONTENT AS conContent, A.CON_USER_ID AS conUserId, A.CON_USER_TEL AS conUserTel, A.CON_EMAIL AS conEmail, A.JOIN_DT AS joinDt, A.ACCEPT_DT AS acceptDt, A.CLOSE_DT AS closeDt, A.USE_YN AS useYn, A.ACTION_YN AS actionYn, A.REG_DTTM AS regDttm, A.UPD_DTTM AS updDttm FROM TBL_COMPCONT_MST A WHERE A.ACTION_YN = 'Y' AND A.COMP_CD = #{compCd} ORDER BY A.START_DT DESC

SELECT TOP 1 B.COMP_NM AS compNm, B.COMP_CD AS compCd, B.COMP_ADDR AS compAddr, B.COMP_TEL AS compTel, B.COMP_FAX AS compFax, A.START_DT AS startDt, A.END_DT AS endDt FROM TBL_COMPCONT_MST A JOIN TBL_COMP_MST B ON B.COMP_CD = A.COMP_CD AND B.ACTION_YN = A.ACTION_YN WHERE A.COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND A.ACTION_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.START_DT DESC
SELECT TOP 1 'Y' FROM TBL_COMPCONT_MST WHERE COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND START_DT = #{startDt} AND END_DT = #{endDt} AND ACTION_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMPCONT_MST ( COMP_CD, START_DT, END_DT, JOB_SEQ, CON_CONTENT, CON_USER_ID, CON_USER_TEL, CON_EMAIL, JOIN_DT, ACCEPT_DT, CLOSE_DT, USE_YN, ACTION_YN, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{compCd}, #{startDt}, #{endDt}, (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(A.JOB_SEQ),0)+1 FROM TBL_COMPCONT_MST A WHERE A.COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND A.START_DT = #{startDt} AND A.END_DT = #{endDt}), #{conContent}, #{conUserId}, #{conUserTel}, #{conEmail}, #{joinDt}, #{acceptDt}, #{closeDt}, #{useYn}, 'Y', GETDATE(), #{regUser}, #{regIp}, GETDATE(), #{updUser}, #{updIp} )
mapper.select:
SELECT CODE_CD AS codeCd, CODE_NM AS codeNm, START_DT AS startDt, END_DT AS endDt, USE_YN AS useYn, SORT AS sort, JOB_SEQ AS jobSeq, ACTION_YN AS actionYn, REG_DTTM AS regDttm, UPD_DTTM AS updDttm FROM TBL_CODE_MST WHERE ACTION_YN = 'Y'
AND ( CODE_CD LIKE '%' + #{findData} + '%' OR CODE_NM LIKE '%' + #{findData} + '%' )
ORDER BY CODE_CD
SELECT TOP 1 'Y' FROM TBL_CODE_MST WHERE CODE_CD = #{codeCd} AND ACTION_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CODE_MST (CODE_CD, JOB_SEQ, CODE_NM, START_DT, END_DT, USE_YN, SORT, ACTION_YN, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP) VALUES (#{codeCd}, (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(A.JOB_SEQ),0)+1 FROM TBL_CODE_MST A WHERE A.CODE_CD = #{codeCd}), #{codeNm}, #{startDt}, #{endDt}, #{useYn}, #{sort}, 'Y', GETDATE(), #{regUser}, #{regIp}, GETDATE(), #{updUser}, #{updIp})
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_CODE_MST SET ACTION_YN='N', UPD_DTTM=GETDATE(), UPD_USER=#{updUser}, UPD_IP=#{updIp} WHERE CODE_CD = #{codeCd} AND ACTION_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT A.CODE_GB AS codeGb, A.CODE_CD AS codeCd, A.SUB_CODE AS subCode, A.SUB_CODE_NM AS subCodeNm, A.START_DT AS startDt, A.END_DT AS endDt, A.USE_YN AS useYn, A.SORT AS sort, A.JOB_SEQ AS jobSeq, A.ACTION_YN AS actionYn, (SELECT TOP 1 G.SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL G WHERE G.CODE_CD = 'CODE_GB' AND G.SUB_CODE = A.CODE_GB AND G.ACTION_YN = 'Y') AS dtlCodeNm FROM TBL_CODE_DTL A WHERE A.ACTION_YN = 'Y' AND A.CODE_CD = #{codeCd} ORDER BY A.SUB_CODE
SELECT TOP 1 'Y' FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_GB = #{codeGb} AND CODE_CD = #{codeCd} AND SUB_CODE = #{subCode} AND ACTION_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CODE_DTL (CODE_GB, CODE_CD, SUB_CODE, SUB_CODE_NM, START_DT, JOB_SEQ, END_DT, USE_YN, SORT, ACTION_YN, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP) VALUES (#{codeGb}, #{codeCd}, #{subCode}, #{subCodeNm}, #{startDt}, (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(A.JOB_SEQ),0)+1 FROM TBL_CODE_DTL A WHERE A.CODE_GB=#{codeGb} AND A.CODE_CD=#{codeCd} AND A.SUB_CODE=#{subCode}), #{endDt}, #{useYn}, #{sort}, 'Y', GETDATE(), #{regUser}, #{regIp}, GETDATE(), #{updUser}, #{updIp})
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_CODE_DTL SET ACTION_YN='N', UPD_DTTM=GETDATE(), UPD_USER=#{updUser}, UPD_IP=#{updIp} WHERE CODE_GB=#{codeGb} AND CODE_CD=#{codeCd} AND SUB_CODE=#{subCode} AND ACTION_YN='Y'
mapper.select: SELECT A.USER_ID AS userId, B.COMP_CD AS compCd, B.COMP_NM AS compNm, A.USER_NM AS userNm, A.START_DT AS startDt, A.END_DT AS endDt, A.MAIN_GU AS mainGu, A.EMAIL AS email, A.USER_TEL AS userTel, CONVERT(VARCHAR(500), A.PASS_WD) AS passWd, A.PASS_CDT AS passCdt, A.BIGO AS bigo, A.COMMST_YN AS commstYn, A.USE_YN AS useYn, A.MBR_JOIN AS mbrJoin, A.REG_DTTM AS regDttm, A.UPD_DTTM AS updDttm, (SELECT SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_GB='Z' AND ACTION_YN='Y' AND CODE_CD='MAIN_GU' AND SUB_CODE=A.MAIN_GU) AS mainGuNm, CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),GETDATE(),112) BETWEEN A.START_DT AND A.END_DT THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS useNot FROM TBL_USER_MST A JOIN TBL_COMP_MST B ON B.COMP_CD = A.COMP_CD AND B.ACTION_YN = A.ACTION_YN WHERE A.COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND A.ACTION_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.USER_ID, A.START_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USER_MST ( COMP_CD, USER_ID, JOB_SEQ, USER_NM, START_DT, END_DT, MAIN_GU, PASS_WD, PASS_CDT, BIGO, EMAIL, USER_TEL, COMMST_YN, USE_YN, MBR_JOIN, ACTION_YN, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{compCd}, #{userId}, (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(A.JOB_SEQ),0)+1 FROM TBL_USER_MST A WHERE A.COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.START_DT = #{startDt}), #{userNm}, #{startDt}, #{endDt}, #{mainGu}, CONVERT(VARBINARY(500), CONVERT(VARCHAR(500), CASE WHEN #{encPassWd} IS NOT NULL AND #{encPassWd} <> '' THEN #{encPassWd} ELSE #{passWd} END)), CONVERT(date, GETDATE()), #{bigo}, #{email}, #{userTel}, #{commstYn}, #{useYn}, #{mbrJoin}, 'Y', GETDATE(), #{regUser}, #{regIp}, GETDATE(), #{updUser}, #{updIp} )
mapper.select: SELECT TOP 1 'Y' FROM TBL_USER_MST WHERE COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND START_DT = #{startDt} AND ACTION_YN = 'Y'
SELECT TOP 1 'Y' FROM TBL_USER_MST WHERE COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ACTION_YN = 'Y'

SELECT USER_ID , USER_ID_NM , USER_NM , IFNULL(USER_GB,'D') AS USER_GB, USER_PW, USEYN, IFNULL(DEPT_NM,'') AS DEPT_NM FROM T_ADMIN_MST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN START_DATE AND END_DATE

SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_ID_NM , USER_GB, USER_PW, DEPT_NM, DATE_FORMAT(START_DATE,'%y-%m-%d') AS START_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(END_DATE,'%y-%m-%d') AS END_DATE, BIGO, USEYN FROM T_ADMIN_MST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT TERMS_SEQ ,TERMS_GB ,TERMS_TITLE ,TERMS_CONTS ,USE_YN ,REG_ID ,REG_DTM ,MOD_ID ,MOD_DTM FROM T_SIGN_MST WHERE TERMS_GB = #{termsGb} ORDER BY TERMS_SEQ ASC
SELECT TERMS_SEQ FROM T_SIGN_MST WHERE TERMS_GB = #{termsGb} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY TERMS_SEQ DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SHIPOUT_MST SET ACTION_YN = 'N', UPD_DTTM = GETDATE(), UPD_USER = #{updUser}, UPD_IP = #{updIp} WHERE DLV_DT = REPLACE(ISNULL(#{dlvDt},''),'-','') AND SHPOUT_DT = REPLACE(ISNULL(#{shpoutDt},''),'-','') AND ISNULL(DC_CD,'') = ISNULL(#{dcCd},'') AND ACTION_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(MAX(JOB_SEQ),0)+1 FROM TBL_SHIPOUT_MST WHERE DLV_DT = REPLACE(ISNULL(#{dlvDt},''),'-','') AND SHPOUT_DT = REPLACE(ISNULL(#{shpoutDt},''),'-','') AND ISNULL(DC_CD,'') = ISNULL(#{dcCd},'')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SHIPOUT_MST ( SHPOUT_DT, DLV_DT, JOB_SEQ, ACTION_YN, ROW_NO, SRC_FILE, UPLOAD_DTTM, INRSV_YN, LABEL_PRT_GB, DC_CD, DC_NM, VENDOR_CD, VENDOR_NM, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, FSFD_GB, STAT_YN, PROD_KIND, TEMP_GB, ORD_GB, BIZ_CD, BIZ_NM, BOX_QTY, LABEL_QTY, UNPAID_LABEL_QTY, INWH, ZONE, BUS_NO, RT_SEQ, CUR_QTY, DLV_GB, REMARK, UNIT, INDIV_ID, ORD_NO, ORD_ITEM_NO, JUMUN_NO, JUMUN_ITEM_NO, SORTER, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP ) VALUES ( REPLACE(ISNULL(#{shpoutDt},''),'-',''), REPLACE(ISNULL(#{dlvDt},''),'-',''), #{jobSeq}, 'Y', #{rowNo}, #{srcFile}, GETDATE(), #{inrsvYn}, #{labelPrtGb}, #{dcCd}, #{dcNm}, #{vendorCd}, #{vendorNm}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{fsfdGb}, #{statYn}, #{prodKind}, #{tempGb}, #{ordGb}, #{bizCd}, #{bizNm}, #{boxQty}, #{labelQty}, #{unpaidLabelQty}, #{inwh}, #{zone}, #{busNo}, #{rtSeq}, #{curQty}, #{dlvGb}, #{remark}, #{unit}, #{indivId}, #{ordNo}, #{ordItemNo}, #{jumunNo}, #{jumunItemNo}, #{sorter}, GETDATE(), #{regUser}, #{regIp} )
mapper.select: SELECT SHPOUT_DT AS shpoutDt, DLV_DT AS dlvDt, JOB_SEQ AS jobSeq, ROW_NO AS rowNo, SRC_FILE AS srcFile, DC_CD AS dcCd, DC_NM AS dcNm, VENDOR_CD AS vendorCd, VENDOR_NM AS vendorNm, ITEM_CD AS itemCd, ITEM_NM AS itemNm, BIZ_CD AS bizCd, BIZ_NM AS bizNm, BOX_QTY AS boxQty, LABEL_QTY AS labelQty, UNPAID_LABEL_QTY AS unpaidLabelQty, INWH AS inwh, ZONE AS zone, BUS_NO AS busNo, RT_SEQ AS rtSeq, CUR_QTY AS curQty, DLV_GB AS dlvGb, REMARK AS remark, PROD_KIND AS prodKind, TEMP_GB AS tempGb, ORD_GB AS ordGb, UNIT AS unit, ORD_NO AS ordNo, ORD_ITEM_NO AS ordItemNo, JUMUN_NO AS jumunNo, JUMUN_ITEM_NO AS jumunItemNo FROM TBL_SHIPOUT_MST WHERE SHPOUT_DT = REPLACE(ISNULL(#{shpoutDt},''),'-','') AND ACTION_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BIZ_NM, ITEM_NM, ROW_NO
SELECT BIZ_CD AS bizCd, JOB_SEQ AS jobSeq, ACTION_YN AS actionYn, BIZ_NM AS bizNm FROM TBL_BIZI_MST WHERE ACTION_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BIZ_NM
